mapper.insert: INSERT INTO shot ( project_id, script_id, shot_no, scene_title, subject, action_desc, env_desc, camera_desc, style_desc, duration_sec, prompt_text, negative_prompt, image_status, video_status, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{projectId}, #{scriptId}, #{shotNo}, #{sceneTitle}, #{subject}, #{actionDesc}, #{envDesc}, #{cameraDesc}, #{styleDesc}, #{durationSec}, #{promptText}, #{negativePrompt}, #{imageStatus}, #{videoStatus}, NOW(), NOW() )

INSERT INTO shot ( project_id, script_id, shot_no, scene_title, subject, action_desc, env_desc, camera_desc, style_desc, duration_sec, prompt_text, negative_prompt, image_status, video_status, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
( #{item.projectId}, #{item.scriptId}, #{item.shotNo}, #{item.sceneTitle}, #{item.subject}, #{item.actionDesc}, #{item.envDesc}, #{item.cameraDesc}, #{item.styleDesc}, #{item.durationSec}, #{item.promptText}, #{item.negativePrompt}, #{item.imageStatus}, #{item.videoStatus}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM shot WHERE project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY shot_no ASC, id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE shot SET scene_title = #{sceneTitle}, subject = #{subject}, action_desc = #{actionDesc}, env_desc = #{envDesc}, camera_desc = #{cameraDesc}, style_desc = #{styleDesc}, duration_sec = #{durationSec}, prompt_text = #{promptText}, negative_prompt = #{negativePrompt}, image_status = #{imageStatus}, video_status = #{videoStatus}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
